betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cutting Board§f

§aSlice, cut, and assemble sandwiches, burgers, tacos, and sushi.§f

The §bCutting Board§f is a reusable crafting utensil for assembly recipes: sandwiches (BLT, Chicken, Fish, PB&J, etc.), burgers (Hamburger, Cheeseburger, Deluxe), tacos, burritos, sushi, wraps, and pizza. Place it in the crafting grid with ingredients — it stays in the grid after crafting.

§6Crafting§f:
§eShapeless recipe:§f
§b• 1× Brick§f
§b• 1× Stick§f
§b• 1× Wood Plank§f

§6Recipe Categories§f:
§b• Sandwiches§f: BLT, Chicken Sandwich, Fish Sandwich, Ham & Cheese, Tuna Fish Sandwich, Peanut Butter & Jelly, Hamburger, Cheeseburger, Deluxe Cheeseburger, Coleslaw Burger, Bacon Cheeseburger.
§b• Tacos & Wraps§f: Taco, Fish Taco, Burrito, Bean Burrito, Pork Lettuce Wrap, Fish Lettuce Wrap, Vegetarian Lettuce Wrap, Spring Roll, Egg Roll, Dim Sum.
§b• Sushi§f: California Roll, Futomaki, Sushi (various types).
§b• Other Assembly§f: Pizza, Supreme Pizza, Meat Feast Pizza, Hot Dog, Corndog, Chili Dog, Footlong.

§6Usage§f:
§9Place the Cutting Board§f in a crafting grid alongside the recipe's ingredients. The Cutting Board is reusable and does not get consumed during crafting. The output is the assembled food item.

§eTip§f: The Cutting Board is one of the most-used utensils — craft multiple for parallel processing, or build your meal production around a single Cutting Board integrated with a §bDrawer Controller§f.
